# Halí Velázquez - Full-Stack Developer

> Full-stack developer with 7+ years of professional experience,
> currently at IBM México. Specialized in Laravel, Vue 3, and
> TypeScript. Based in México. Open to remote opportunities.

## Blog

Technical articles about Laravel, Vue 3, Linux, algorithms,
and software development from a Mexican developer's perspective.

- https://halivert.dev/blog/
